_comment: DCF Mesh Agent MCP client configuration for Hermes (or Claude Code / OpenCode).
Add this entire block under 'mcpServers' in your Hermes MCP config.
The 'dcf-mesh-mcp' binary is installed by services.dcf-mesh-agent when enabled.
Make sure DCF_PEERS points at the peer you want to talk to (or the responder's port).
